jobs.prompt: 16:9 editorial illustration for a university linear algebra lecture on matrix operations, matrix multiplication, rank of a product, determinant of a product, and inverse matrices. Show a calm mathematical scene with rectangular matrix blocks, arrows suggesting composition of transformations, and one highlighted reversible mapping motif; the image should feel explanatory and structured, not abstract decoration. Warm paper background #faf9f5, ink-like accents #141413, dusty blue #6a9bcc, terracotta #d97757, olive #788c5d. Premium academic style, spacious layout, no readable text, no digits, no formulas, no UI.
